reading_units.text: 誠者自成也，而道自道也。

layers.translation_en: Sincerity is that whereby self-completion is effected, and its way is that by which man must direct himself.

reading_units.text: 誠者物之終始，不誠無物。是故君子誠之為貴。

layers.translation_en: Sincerity is the end and beginning of things; without sincerity there would be nothing.

reading_units.text: 誠者非自成己而已也，所以成物也。成己，仁也；成物，知也。性之德也，合外內之道也，故時措之宜也。

layers.translation_en: On this account, the superior man regards the attainment of sincerity as the most excellent thing.

chapter.text:
誠者自成也，而道自道也。
誠者物之終始，不誠無物。是故君子誠之為貴。
誠者非自成己而已也，所以成物也。成己，仁也；成物，知也。性之德也，合外內之道也，故時措之宜也。

source_title: 四書章句集注 : 中庸章句
